---
name: Feature task
about: A small, reviewable implementation task for AgViz
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

Describe the smallest useful feature to implement.

## Scope

- [ ] One clear deliverable
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated if commands or behaviour change

## Relevant files

Suggested files to touch:

- `src/...`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Behaviour is visible in the app or covered by tests

## Notes for AI agent

Keep this change small. Do not introduce Pyodide, Graphviz/Wasm, Qt, or backend services unless this issue explicitly asks for them.
